source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the image, in a uniform magnetic field with a magnetic induction \( \vec{B} \), there is a circular current-carrying wire. Points \( a \), \( b \), and \( c \) are three current elements of equal length on the wire. The relationship between the magnitudes of the Ampere forces acting on them is:
